stemHtml: It is 20:43 UTC. A pilot is fourteen minutes from the next waypoint, the ‘CMB’ VOR, when he/she is asked to give an estimate for CMB. What is the reply?

options.a: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR zero eight five seven Papa Mike.
options.c: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR twenty fifty seven.
options.d: Estimate Charlie Mike Bravo-VOR two zero five seven.
